race.comment: LADY FERN (12) just missed this grade two back then skipped a grade last time and wasn't beaten far. Well placed back a notch for this and gets chance to return to winning form. LAWRENNY BOYS (3) was a strong maiden winner two back then raced in open 3yo grade latest and tried to lead throughout but found one better. This easier and in great form but will just need a touch of luck early from a wide draw. WILD NIGHTS (13) rates highly on her best performances and deserves another chance. ACCUSAIENT (15) ran below par last time when sixth over 1200m at this track and beaten 6 lengths. Will find this more suitable and can feature.
